name: Documentation Feedback
description: Improve or correct documentation
title: "[DOCS] Short description of doc fix or addition"
labels: ["documentation"]
body: |

  ## File(s) Affected
  (e.g. docs/01-architecture/architecture-overview.md)

  ## Issue
  What is wrong, missing, or unclear?

  ## Correction / Addition
  What should the documentation say instead, or what should be added?

  ## Why It Matters
  Brief explanation of why this documentation change is important.

  ---
  *Feedback sent via contact.samaris.os@gmail.com*
